smore-pie.name: S'more Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Make crust: Mix together graham cracker crumbs, melted butter, sugar, and salt in a medium bowl until well combined. Press mixture into the bottom of a springform pan.
Make graham brownie: Mix together graham cracker crumbs, condensed milk, chocolate chips, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl until well combined. Gently spread on top of crust.
Bake in the preheated oven until the top is dry, about 30 minutes. Remove pie from the oven and set aside to cool slightly. Increase oven temperature to 218°C (220 degrees C).

Meanwhile, make chocolate custard: Whisk together sugar, cocoa powder, cornstarch, and salt in a medium saucepan. Gradually whisk in milk. Cook and stir over medium-high heat until thickened, 5 to 7 minutes. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook for about 2 minutes more. Pour beaten egg gradually into chocolate custard while stirring. Cook and stir for 2 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla.
Pour chocolate custard over baked pie. Arrange regular marshmallows on top of pie and sprinkle miniature marshmallows to fill in any gaps.
Bake in the preheated oven until marshmallows are lightly browned, about 5 minutes; keep an eye on it because you do not want marshmallows to melt.

Make chocolate ganache: Place cream in a microwave-safe bowl and cook in the microwave on high until hot, making sure it doesn't bubble over, 45 to 60 seconds. Mix in chocolate, butter, and coffee granules. Microwave for 30 more seconds, then stir until smooth. Let sit to thicken, 15 to 20 minutes. Drizzle chocolate ganache over pie.

sac-roasting-recipe-lezzet.name: Sac Roasting Recipe

ingredients.item: 500 grams of lamb bird meat (or dana bird)
2 tablespoons of liquid oil or butter
You can get a more aromatic taste by adding garlic.
It gives a pleasant aroma to use fresh peppers or thyme branches during roasting.
On the side you can fortune with to for yogurt or calet.

instructions: 1. Clean the dirt meats and strain.
2. Heat your sheet in heat push in fire.
3. Add liquid oil or butter.
4. Take the meats into the sheet hot u and roast with sustring.
5. Continue roasting meats water and roasting up to the water.
6. Add chopped onion, pepper and tomatoes.
7. roast vegetables to soften.
8. Add spices such as salt, pepper, red powder pepper and thyme.
9. My materials are thoroughly mixed and roasted until the meat softens.
10. Serve hot.
11. 11. You can offer it with rice, lava or bulgur rice.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

saksi-kebab-recipe-lezzet.name: Saksi Kebab Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 pcs of bostan spoon (each is about 250-300 g, scaffolding two-cuts and internally blended)
You can use mixed colored spoons or small-sized spoons instead of Bostan mosque; presentations from chest increased.
Instead of frying eggplants, cooking light oily in the oven, making food less oily and light.
Instead of dana ad, you can use lamb ad or chicken chest you can get different tastes.
If you want to make a short timequired fine meat piece can be preferred.
You can create a variety of colors & colors using red and yellow peppers instead of green and pepper.
Instead of onion, you can add different aromas by adding pırasa or arpacık onions.
Instead of salt, pepper and pepper, you can get different locality by adding thyme or red pepper mix.
Bitter lovers can increase the amount of inner or add fresh bitter pepper.
Tomato salç instead of pepper can use mixed salça;sosun color and flavor changes.
You can get a richer taste by adding some olive oil or butter while preparing the sauce.

instructions: 1. Peel and eliminate the shells of eggplants in the pijamas.
2. Let the pain &ccedil, putting their play and eggplants into the water with lemons.
3. Dry the eggplants from the water & on the basis of paper towel.
4. Süzün't.
5. Heat liquid oil in a large pan, add chopped onions and roast until softened.
6. Add to the pots and green peppers to the pan, continue roasting until the peppers are softened.
7. Add birds to the pan.
8. Salt, pepper and pepper, as well as sprinkled meats water and nuts in the middle fire.
9. Take the cooked mixture from the stove and share it to the i&ccedil of fried eggplants.
10. Salary mix the beer with water and go to the mosque
11. 11. 11. 11. From 180 degrees to 15 minutes.
12. From the oven to hot and hot.

salad-sandwiches-with-ranch-spread.name: Salad Sandwiches With Ranch Spread

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Of little gem lettuce or  0.5 romaine heart

instructions: Whisk shallot, mayonnaise, buttermilk, lemon juice, oil, chives, dill, and Dijon in a small bowl until smooth. Stir in sugar and season with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Ranch spread can be made 8 hours ahead. Cover and chill.
Arrange tomatoes, lettuce, eggs, avocado, cucumber, and shallots on a large platter. Drizzle with oil and lemon juice; sprinkle with sea salt.
Spread one side of each slice of bread with butter. Build sandwiches with bread, salad, and ranch spread.

salmon-and-chive-tea-sandwiches.name: Salmon And Chive Tea Sandwiches
instructions: Spread a thin layer of cream cheese on 2 slices of bread. Crumble a small amount of smoked salmon over 1 slice. sandwich. Seal up and carefully trim off crust. Cut crustless sandwich in half. Repeat with remaining ingredients.

salted-watermelon-juice.name: Salted Watermelon Juice

ingredients.prep: from  0.75 of a 6-lb. baby seedless watermelon

instructions: Purée watermelon in a blender until smooth. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a large pitcher or measuring glass, pressing on solids to extract as much juice as possible; discard solids. Mix in salt.
Pour juice into ice-filled glasses. Garnish with lime wedges if desired.

sauce-with-forest-fruits-argiro.name: Sauce With Forest Fruits
sauce-with-forest-fruits-argiro.original_name: Εύκολη σάλτσα με φρούτα του δάσους
instructions: Melt in a bowl, with the hands half the fruit.
Pour with the cognac, add some icing, and mix.
Pour the sauce and the rest of the fruit over cakes, sweets or even plain yogurt, sprinkle with icing and enjoy.

sauteed-carrots-lezzet.name: Sauteed Carrots

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons of olive oil or butter

instructions: 1. Carrot wash thoroughly.
2. If you want, you can peel the shells, but you can also use the shell without peeling.
3. Heat the olive oil or butter in a large pan.
4. Baby carrot add them to the pan and soak up to 5-7 minutes in medium fire.
5. Make the light softening of the Carrot
6. U add salt, pepper, powder sugar and drink yellowms.
7. Mix Hawthorn well with carrot and cook for 5-7 minutes.
8. Carrot to continue until the softeners are mixed together.
9. Take the sauce from the kitchen.
10. Serve hot by s&uuml with thin chopped parsley.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

sauteed-mushrooms-with-quail-eggs-telecu.name: Sauteed Mushrooms With Quail Eggs
sauteed-mushrooms-with-quail-eggs-telecu.original_name: Cogumelos salteados com ovos de codorniz
instructions: Lave os cogumelos e corte-os em quartos. Descasque os dentes de alho, esmague-os e coloque-os numa frigideira. Leve ao lume a alourar no azeite junto com os cogumelos.
Corte o presunto em tiras mais pequenas e junte aos cogumelos, deixe cozinhar em lume alto, mas sem queimar. Adicione o tomilho e os figos secos cortados ao meio e envolva.
Break the quail eggs into the frying pan and let them cook until they are starry. Season with salt and pepper and serve to taste.

scotch-eggs.name: Scotch Eggs

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground pepper

instructions:
Fill a large bowl with ice water. Bring a small saucepan of water to a boil, then add 4 large eggs and boil for exactly 6 minutes. Immediately transfer eggs into the ice water bath and let cool for at least 1 minute, up to 5. Gently crack shells and carefully peel under cold running water. Place eggs back into bowl of ice water; cover and chill until cold.
Do Ahead: Eggs can be boiled and peeled up to 1 day in advance. Keep chilled.

Place 1 cup (125 g) all-purpose flour in a wide shallow bowl and 1 cup (50 g) panko breadcrumbs in another wide shallow bowl. Divide 1 lb. (about 1¼ cups) fresh breakfast sausage, casings removed (if necessary) into 4 equal portions. (You can eyeball it.) Pat 1 portion of sausage into a thin patty roughly ⅛" thick on top of a sheet of plastic wrap. Lay 1 soft-boiled egg on top of sausage and wrap sausage around egg using the plastic wrap to help enrobe it, sealing the sausage to completely enclose. Repeat with remaining sausage and eggs.

Whisk remaining 2 large eggs in a medium bowl to blend. Working gently with 1 sausage-wrapped egg at a time, dip eggs into flour, shaking off excess, then coat in beaten egg. Roll in panko to coat. Repeat with remaining eggs.
Do Ahead: Breaded eggs be assembled 1 day ahead. Keep refrigerated, uncovered.

Attach a deep-fry thermometer to the side of a large heavy pot. Pour in vegetable oil to a depth of 2" and heat over medium heat to 375°. Fry eggs, turning occasionally and maintaining oil temperature of 350° by adjusting the heat as needed, until sausage is cooked through and breading is golden brown and crisp, 7–9 minutes. Use a slotted spoon to transfer eggs to paper towels to drain. Season lightly with kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper. Serve warm with mustard (if using).
Editor’s note: This recipe for Scotch eggs was first printed in our January 2012 issue and has been updated to make the boiling method more consistent, change the coating from cornflakes, and for ease of assembly. Head this way for more of our favorite recipes with sausage →

sea-bass-ceviche-pequerecetas.name: Sea Bass Ceviche

ingredients.item: 1 cebolla morada (media para el ceviche, la otra media para decorar si se quiere)

instructions: We cut the cordage into small dice and put it into a bowl. We added lime juice and a pint of salt. Let's remove and leave to stand in the refrigerator for 10-15 minutes.
Meanwhile, we cut the onion into thin strips, the red pepper into small pits and minced the cilantro.
Cuando el pescado haya cambiado de color, incorporamos la cebolla, el pimiento y el cilantro al bol. Mezclamos con suavidad para no romper el pescado.
We rectify salt if necessary and let them rest a few more minutes. We serve well cold, with a little more cilantro above if we want.

sea-bass-with-cherry-tomatoes.name: Sea Bass With Cherry Tomatoes

ingredients.item: -ounce fillets sea bass or other white fish

instructions: Place a rack in upper third of oven and preheat broiler. Combine shallot, garlic, tomatoes, olives, and oil in a medium bowl, season with salt and pepper, and toss well. Set aside.

Place fish in a 13x9-inch glass baking dish and season with salt and pepper. Scatter tomato mixture over fish and broil until fish is opaque throughout and tomatoes have started to burst, 10–13 minutes. Serve with basil scattered over top.

seafood-sheet-pan-meal.name: Seafood Sheet Pan Meal
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a 10x15-inch baking pan with aluminum foil.
Arrange broccoli in a single layer on the prepared pan. Drizzle with 2 teaspoons oil. Sprinkle with garlic, 1/2 of the za'atar, and 1/8 teaspoon each salt and pepper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 10 minutes.

Drizzle salmon with remaining 1 teaspoon oil, remaining za'atar, and remaining salt and pepper. Top with lemon slices. Add to the pan. Roast until vegetables are tender and fish flakes easily when tested with a fork, 12 to 15 minutes.
Sprinkle with feta cheese.

seasoned-spinach-root-lezzet.name: Seasoned Spinach Root
instructions: 1. Peel onions and off.
2.  Margarini tencerede eritin.
3. Add onions and meat and cook for 20-25 minutes.
4. Karabiber add half water and salt and cook 45 minutes in jealous fire.
5. Wash the root parts of the spinach with plenty of water.
6. Add water to a pot and go over.
7. Light weight and strain.
8. Store boiling water.
9. Place the meats on the middle of a large pot.
10. Smoothly index the root of spinach to the remaining cavity around.
11. 11. Add salt and a remaining glass of water and close the cover of the pot.
12. Cook in medium fire.
12. August Cover a plate on the cookware and transfer it to the bottom by top.
14 July Beat the egg in a bowl.
15. Add lemon juice and continue to cook.
16. 1. of the water that you smoked the soak roots
17. Add up to 5 cups and get in the pot.
18. Boil in jealous fire until the jealous fire is darkened.
19. September Add the prepared finishing on the roots of meat and spinach in the plate.
20. Serve hot.

semolina-halva-recipe-lezzet.name: Semolina Halva Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 cup butter (or mixture of semi-half liquid oil)
3 cup milk(see water or semi-half milk-water mixture)
1 cup of peanut or pine peanu Tags

instructions: 1. Mix sugar and milk in a pot.
2. Heat the sugar in the middle fire until completely melt, close the golden when it starts to boil.
3. melt butter in a separate pot.
4. Add peanuts and roast the gold color area in the jealous fire.
5. Add and mix with meat 15–20 minutes to daken the color and nice smell until you.
6. Roasted poems pour carefully.
7. (Be careful at this stage, since it will be steam and lilac.
8. ) After washing, close the cover of the pot and cook until 5 minutes in jealous fire.
9. Close the oven and listen to 15 minutes.
10. With spoon or mold, you can serve with cinnamon or ice cream.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

sheet-pan-stuffed-pastry-pockets.name: Sheet Pan Stuffed Pastry Pockets

ingredients.prep: beaten with 1 tablespoon water or milk

instructions: On a lightly floured surface, roll out the puff pastry sheets to 9x12-inch (23x30-cm) rectangles. Set one pastry sheet aside and fold the other in half lengthwise, then in half crosswise twice, to form creases for 8 pockets. Unfold the pastry sheet on the prepared baking sheet.
Make the Strawberries ‘n’ Cream filling: In a small bowl, combine the cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla, and mix until smooth.
Make the Very Berry filling: In a small bowl, mash the raspberries, then add the blueberries, sugar, lemon juice, and lemon zest. Mix with a fork.
Spoon the berry mixture over the center of 2 of the 8 rectangles.
Use a spatula to spread the chocolate hazelnut spread over the center of 2 more rectangles, then top with the banana slices.
Use a spatula to spread the cream cheese mixture in the center of 2 more rectangles, then top with the strawberries.
Place apples slices in the center of the remaining 2 rectangles, then sprinkle with the brown sugar and cinnamon.
Preheat the oven to 400˚F (200˚C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

Brush the egg wash over the pastry around the edges and between each filling, then top with the remaining puff pastry sheet. Use your fingers to press the pastry down around each filling. Once tightly pressed, use a pizza cutter or knife to cut out each pocket.
Seal the outside edges with a fork. Poke the top of each pocket with a fork 3-4 times to ventilate. Brush the tops with egg wash.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Make the glaze: In a medium bowl, combine the powdered sugar, milk, and vanilla. Stir until smooth and thick.
Remove the pockets from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes. Decorate with the glaze, then serve immediately, or wrap in wax paper and freeze for up to a week. Reheat in the toaster oven.
Enjoy!

sheet-pan-steak-fajitas.name: Sheet-pan Steak Fajitas
instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230°C).

Lay the flank steak in the middle of a baking sheet. Arrange the bell peppers and red onion around it. Drizzle everything with olive oil and season with salt, pepper, chili powder, garlic powder, and cumin.
Using your hands, rub the seasoning into the vegetables, then into the steak. Flip the steak and season the other side.
Squeeze the lime juice over the top of the steak and veggies.
Cook for 12 minutes, or until the meat has reached your desired doneness.
Transfer the steak to a cutting board and let it rest for 10 minutes, then slice it into pieces, going against the grain.
Fill up a warm tortilla with the steak, bell peppers, and onion.
Garnish with cilantro, and serve.
Enjoy!

shellfish-mixed-grill.name: Shellfish Mixed Grill

ingredients.prep: bodies and tails split in half and gills removed (ask your fish monger to do this for you)
Sambal-Orange Vinaigrette and Chorizo-Lemon Butter , for serving

instructions: Light a grill or preheat a grill pan. Arrange your grill so about half is set to high heat and half is set to moderate. Soak 6 to 8 bamboo skewers for about 15 minutes.

Twist off the lobster claws and use the base of a knife handle or a mallet to crack them. Arrange the lobster on a baking sheet and brush the cut sides of the bodies with some of the melted butter; season lightly with salt and pepper.
Thread 3 to 4 shrimp on each of the skewers, brush with olive oil, season with salt and pepper and add them to the baking sheet.

Grill the lobster claws over moderate heat, turning occasionally, for about 5 minutes. Add the lobster bodies to the hot side of the grill cut side down; grill just until the meat just starts to brown, about 3 minutes. Flip the lobster and transfer it to the cooler part of the grill with the claws. Generously brush the bodies with more butter and close the lid. Grill until cooked through, about 5 minutes longer. Transfer the bodies and claws to a platter.

Meanwhile, arrange the clams on the hot part of the grill, close the lid and grill until they pop open, 5 to 7 minutes. As each opens, transfer it to a bowl, trying to keep as much as the juice as possible.

Grill the shrimp over high heat until light brown grill marks form, 2 to 3 minutes. Flip and grill for 2 to 3 minutes longer, until cooked through. Transfer to the platter with the lobster and serve all of the seafood with the sauces.

shepherds-pie-the-irish-lamb-and-potato-.name: Shepherd's Pie: The Irish Lamb And Potato Pie
shepherds-pie-the-irish-lamb-and-potato-.original_name: Shepherd’s Pie: el pastel de cordero y patata irlandés

ingredients.item: 800 g de carne picada de cordero
3 cucharadas de aceite de oliva o 30 g de mantequilla

instructions: Cut 1 large onion and 2 medium carrots into small pits and pica 2 garlic teeth.
Warm 3 tablespoons of olive oil in a large saucer and scrape onion and carrot for 8-10 minutes, till soft. Add garlic and cook another 1 minute.
It incorporates 800 g of minced lamb meat and cook it with medium-high heat for 8-10 minutes, stirring so that it crumbles well and lose raw color.
Add 1 tablespoon of flour and cook 2 minutes, stirring so that there's no raw flavour.
Incorpora 2 cucharadas de concentrado de tomate y 1 cucharada de salsa Worcestershire y mezcla bien.
Vierte 250 ml de caldo de carne caliente, salpimienta y deja cocinar a fuego medio durante 15-20 minutos, hasta que el relleno quede espeso.
Add 100 g of peas in the last 5 minutes of cooking and booking.
Meanwhile, pits 1 kg of potatoes, cut them into pieces and necks them into salt water for 20- 25 minutes, till they are tender. Listen to them well.
Reg hot potatoes and add 50 g of butter and 100 ml of hot milk. Mix to get a creamy purée, tit salt, add pepper and a pint of nutmeg if you like.

It purifies the oven at 200 been 3 been. Put the pilling into an oven source, extend the purée above and clear the surface with a spatula. If you wish, light with a fork and sprinkle a pint of sweet pimenton above.
Hornea for 20- 25 minutes, until the surface is slightly golden. If you want more color, 3-5 final minutes.

shrimp-pasta-with-preserved-lemon.name: Shrimp Pasta With Preserved Lemon

ingredients.prep: finely grated (about 1 cup), plus more for serving

instructions: Cook 1 lb. medium tube-shaped pasta (such as rigatoni or penne) in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain, reserving 2 cups pasta cooking liquid.

Meanwhile, pat 1 lb. large shrimp, peeled, deveined, dry with paper towels; season lightly with kosher salt. Heat ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium. Add 6 garlic cloves, finely chopped, ¼ cup finely chopped preserved lemon, and ½ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes and cook, stirring often, until preserved lemon is softened, about 2 minutes. Add shrimp and cook, stirring often, until just opaque, about 2 minutes.

Add pasta, 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into 2 pieces, and 1 cup pasta cooking liquid and cook, tossing vigorously, until butter is melted and sauce is thickened slightly, about 2 minutes. Add ½ cup finely grated Parmesan; toss until melted. Add ½ cup pasta cooking liquid, 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into 2 pieces, and ½ cup finely grated Parmesan and cook, stirring vigorously and adding more pasta cooking liquid if needed, until sauce is thickened and coats pasta, about 1 minute. Mix in 1 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice and ⅓ cup finely chopped parsley.
Divide pasta among shallow bowls. Top with more finely grated Parmesan and finely chopped parsley.

shrimp-po-boys.name: Shrimp Po' Boys
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Make the rémoulade: Mix mayonnaise, ponzu, horseradish, relish, garlic, and cayenne together in a bowl. Set aside.
Make the sandwiches: Mix melted butter and garlic together in a small bowl. Place rolls, split-sides up, onto a baking sheet. Brush the insides with garlic butter.
Cook in the preheated oven until toasted, 1 to 3 minutes. Remove from the oven and set aside.
Heat oil in a deep fryer or large saucepan to 182°C (182 degrees C).
Mix flour and Creole seasoning together in a bowl. Place beaten eggs into a second bowl and panko into a third bowl.

Dredge shrimp in flour mixture; shake off excess. Dip into beaten egg. Lift up so excess egg drips back in the bowl. Press into bread crumbs to coat both sides. Place breaded shrimp, unstacked, onto a plate.
Fry shrimp in batches in the preheated oil until breading is golden brown and meat is opaque, about 2 minutes per side.
Spread rémoulade onto rolls. Top with hot shrimp, then shredded lettuce.

skillet-mushroom-lasagna.name: Skillet Mushroom Lasagna

ingredients.prep: oyster, shiitake, and/or crimini), trimmed, torn into 1" pieces

ingredients.item: Crème fraîche or thinned sour cream

instructions: Heat 3 Tbsp. oil in a large high-sided ovenproof skillet or small Dutch oven over medium-high. Add mushrooms and cook, undisturbed, until starting to brown, about 4 minutes. Season with salt and cook, tossing occasionally, until golden brown, 5–7 minutes. Transfer to a bowl; mix in thyme.

Reduce heat to medium-low. Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in skillet. Add shallot and garlic and cook, stirring, until starting to soften, about 1 minute. Sprinkle flour over and cook, stirring, until golden, about 1 minute.

Add milk, pepper, 1½ tsp. salt, and 1¾ cups water, then finely grate zest of ¼ lemon into pan. Stir to dissolve flour, increase heat to medium, and cook until gently bubbling. Reduce heat to low, whisk in crème fraîche, and stir to combine. Add about one third of noodles, pushing down into sauce to submerge, followed by a third of  mushrooms. Repeat with half of remaining noodles and mushrooms. Top with another layer of noodles. Set remaining mushrooms aside. Cover with a lid or foil and cook 15 minutes. (If lasagna threatens to boil over, use very lowest heat and/or prop open the cover.) Uncover; cook, gently lifting and separating noodles occasionally with tongs or a spatula to let sauce flow around, until sauce is thickened and noodles are cooked through, 6–8 minutes. Mixture should be bubbling gently; adjust heat as necessary. Remove from heat.

Heat broiler. Top lasagna with mozzarella and reserved mushrooms. Broil until cheese is bubbling and browned in spots, about 2 minutes. Finely grate more lemon zest over. Sprinkle with Parmesan; season with pepper. Let sit 5–10 minutes. Cut lemon into wedges and serve with lasagna.

skillet-phyllo-pie-with-butternut-squash.name: Skillet Phyllo Pie With Butternut Squash, Kale, And Goat Cheese

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, thinly sliced crosswise

instructions: Place a rack in lower third of oven; preheat to 400°. Heat 3 Tbsp. oil in a large ovenproof skillet over medium. Add onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened but not browned, 6–8 minutes. Add squash and cook, stirring occasionally, until almost tender, 8–10 minutes. Mix in thyme and red pepper flakes and transfer to a medium bowl; let cool. Wipe out and reserve skillet.

Add kale, eggs, Parmesan, and lemon zest to squash mixture and gently mix to combine; season with salt and pepper. Layer phyllo sheets inside reserved skillet. Spoon kale-and-squash mixture into phyllo and dot top with goat cheese. Brush edges of phyllo lightly with oil and fold over filling, overlapping slightly, leaving center exposed.

Cook pie over medium heat until bottom of pastry is just golden (carefully lift up on one side with a heatproof rubber spatula so that you can take a peek), about 3 minutes. Transfer skillet to oven and bake pie until kale is wilted and tender and phyllo is golden brown and crisp, 20–25 minutes. Let pie cool in skillet at least 15 minutes before slicing into wedges.
Do Ahead: Pie can be baked 6 hours ahead. Let cool; store uncovered at room temperature.

slow-cooker-caribou-stew.name: Slow Cooker Caribou Stew
instructions: Place flour in a shallow bowl. Dredge meat in flour to coat; shake off excess.

Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium. Add meat; cook and stir until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a large slow cooker; add beef stock, carrots, celery, potatoes, onion, diced tomatoes with juice, bay leaves, oregano, Worcestershire sauce, thyme, and garlic. Gently stir mixture.
Cover the slow cooker. Cook on Low for 8 hours.

slow-cooker-irish-stew.name: Slow Cooker Irish Stew

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add stew meat and cook until browned on all sides, 5 to 10 minutes.
Transfer browned meat to a slow cooker. Add potatoes, onion, water, bouillon cubes, salt, and pepper.
Cover and cook on Low for 8 hours.

slow-roasted-honey-glazed-pork.name: Slow-roasted Honey Glazed Pork
instructions: In a large bowl, combine 1 cup (240 ml) of the soy sauce with the sugar, garlic, and scallions, stirring until mixed.
Score the skin of the pork by slicing a crosshatch pattern through the skin down to the meat. This will help excess fat render out and allow more of the marinade to soak in.
Place the pork in the marinade and toss to coat evenly. Marinate for one hour.
Preheat the oven to 275ºF (140°C).

On a baking sheet, place the asparagus halves to the right and diced potatoes to the left. Toss the vegetables with the oil, salt, and pepper. Place the marinated pork in the middle of the baking sheet.
Bake 1 to 1 ½ hours, depending on the weight of the pork.
Raise the heat of the oven to 500ºF (260ºC).
In a small bowl, combine the brown sugar, honey, and remaining soy sauce, stirring until smooth.
Spoon the honey glaze over the top of the pork, making sure to fill the cracks and crevices on top.
Bake for 20 minutes until sugar is dark brown and caramelized, and the top of the pork is crispy.
Remove the vegetables and pork from the tray, making sure to save all the juices.
Slice the pork into ½-inch (2 ½ cm) slices, and plate with the roasted vegetables. Spoon the reserved pan juices on top of the pork.
Enjoy!

slow-roasted-rhubarb.name: Slow-roasted Rhubarb
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Place rhubarb and ginger in an 8x8" baking dish; scatter sugar over and scrape in seeds from vanilla bean; save pod for another use. Toss and let sit until rhubarb releases some juices, 20–25 minutes.
Roast rhubarb, tossing once, until tender and juices are syrupy, 20–25 minutes. Let cool slightly.
Serve over ice cream or shortbread.

sluggers-strawberry-slushies.name: Sluggers' Strawberry Slushies
instructions: Purée strawberries, Riesling, lemon juice, and sugar in a food processor until liquefied. Process in an ice cream maker according to manufacturer's instructions. Divide among cups. Serve immediately with straws, or transfer to a container and freeze.

sourdough-italian-sausage-and-chestnut-s.name: Sourdough, Italian Sausage, And Chestnut Stuffing

ingredients.prep: cut into pieces, divided, plus more

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Chicken stock or low-sodium chicken broth

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Butter a shallow 3-qt. baking dish and a sheet of foil. Place bread in a very large bowl.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a small saucepan over medium heat. Add chestnuts, season with salt and pepper, and cook, stirring often, until chestnuts are golden and crisp, about 5 minutes. Transfer to bowl with bread with a slotted spoon.

Heat remaining ¼ cup oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Add sausage and cook, stirring occasionally and breaking into small pieces with a wooden spoon, until browned and cooked through, 8–10 minutes. Transfer to bowl with slotted spoon.

Add onions, celery, and chiles to skillet, season with salt and pepper, and cook, stirring often, until onions are translucent and soft, 5–7 minutes. Add apple, garlic, and sage and cook, stirring occasionally, until onions are golden brown and apple is soft, about 5 minutes. Discard chiles. Add onion mixture to bowl.

Reduce heat to medium and cook Sherry in skillet, scraping up any browned bits, until almost all evaporated, about 1 minute. Add ½ cup butter; cook, stirring, until melted. Drizzle over bread mixture.

Whisk eggs and 2 cups stock in a medium bowl; pour over bread mixture. Season with salt and pepper and toss, adding more stock ¼-cupful at a time as needed (you may not use it all), until combined and bread is hydrated. Transfer to prepared dish and dot with remaining ¼ cup butter.

Cover with buttered foil; bake until a paring knife inserted into the center comes out hot, 30–35 minutes. Increase oven temperature to 450°. Uncover and bake until top is golden brown and crisp, 20–25 minutes. Let sit 10 minutes before serving.
DO AHEAD: Stuffing can be assembled 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

southern-tomato-sandwich.name: Southern Tomato Sandwich
instructions: Spread 1 to 2 tablespoons mayonnaise (depending on taste) evenly over both slices of bread.
Place two slices of tomato on one slice of bread and sprinkle with half of the salt and pepper.
Add two more slices of tomato and sprinkle with remaining salt and pepper
Place second slice of bread, mayonnaise side down, on the top.
Slice and Enjoy!

spatchcock-turkey-with-anise-and-orange.name: Spatchcock Turkey With Anise And Orange

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 cup plus 1 0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: giblets, and backbone removed and reserved)

instructions: Toast 5 tsp. aniseed in a dry small skillet over medium heat, tossing occasionally, until fragrant, about 3 minutes. Let cool; finely grind in a spice mill or a mortar and pestle. (Alternatively, chop with a knife.)

Pulse ½ cup (72 g) Diamond Crystal or ¼ cup plus 1½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, ¼ cup finely grated orange zest, 2 Tbsp. dark brown sugar, 1 Tbsp. coarsely chopped fresh rosemary, 1 Tbsp. fresh thyme leaves, 2 tsp. freshly ground black pepper, and 4 tsp. toasted aniseed in a food processor until finely chopped.

Place 1 12–14-lb. turkey (neck, giblets, and backbone removed and reserved), skin side down, on a cutting board. Use a knife to score down long oblong bone in the center of breast. Turn skin side up and press down on breastbone to flatten. You should hear a crack and feel the bones give way. Sprinkle salt mixture liberally all over turkey, patting to adhere. You may not need all of it, but it’s good to have extra since some will end up on the baking sheet. Place turkey, breast side up, on a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet and chill, uncovered, at least 6 hours and up to 2 days.

Preheat oven to 450°. Arrange 2 medium onions, quartered, 4 large carrots, peeled, halved, 4 celery stalks, 3 heads garlic, halved, and reserved rosemary and thyme sprigs in a roasting pan. Brush excess salt mixture off turkey and pat dry any damp parts with paper towels. Place, skin side up, on top of vegetables; let sit at room temperature 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat ½ cup olive oil, 4 wide strips orange zest, and remaining toasted aniseed in a small saucepan until oil is sizzling, about 2 minutes; let cool slightly.

Brush turkey with flavored oil, add ½ cup water to pan, and roast turkey 30 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350° and continue to roast, brushing with more oil every 20 minutes, until skin is deep golden brown and crisp and an instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part of thigh registers 165°, about 1 hour longer. Transfer to a platter; tent with foil and let cooked turkey rest at least 30 minutes before carving. 

Editor’s note: This spatchcock turkey recipe was first printed in our November 2014 issue. Head this way for more of our best Thanksgiving dinner recipes →

speculaas-cookies.name: Speculaas Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Dust two baking sheets with flour.

Beat brown sugar and butter together in a bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in egg, cinnamon, baking powder, cloves, and nutmeg. Mix in flour, 1 cup at a time, until dough comes together.
Shape dough into cookies by hand or roll out and cut dough with cookie cutters; arrange on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until firm but not hard, about 10 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack to cool.

spiced-lamb-burger.name: Spiced Lamb Burger

ingredients.item: Thick medium pita breads with pockets

instructions: Using a fork, mix lamb, onion, parsley, coriander, cumin, cinnamon, salt, pepper, and ¼ cup oil in a large bowl. Cover and chill at least 1 hour.

Prepare grill for medium heat and oil grate. Working one at a time, open each pita pocket by cutting along seam, halfway around perimeter. Spoon filling into pitas, spreading to edges. Close, pressing on filling to seal.
Grill pitas until filling is cooked through and bread is crisp, about 5 minutes per side.
DO AHEAD: Filling can be made 8 hours ahead; keep chilled. Pita breads can be stuffed 1 hour ahead; cover and chill.

spiced-lamb-hand-pies.name: Spiced Lamb Hand Pies

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Bring vinegar to a boil in a small saucepan. Add currants; set aside.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook onion, stirring occasionally, until browned and softened, about 5 minutes. Add garlic; season with salt and pepper. Cook, stirring, 1 minute. Add tomato paste, cumin, ginger, cardamom, and turmeric and cook until fragrant and sticky, about 1 minute. Add lamb and cook, breaking up with a spoon, until browned and cooked through, about 3 minutes. Stir in tomatoes, season with salt and pepper, and bring to a simmer. Stir in peas; cook until bright green, about 5 minutes. Drain reserved currants and add to lamb along with parsley. Let cool.

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Working with one at a time, roll out dough on a lightly floured surface to 12” squares. Cut each into 4 squares; transfer to 2 parchment-lined baking sheets. Spoon filling onto one side of squares, leaving ½” border. Brush edges with egg and fold dough over filling. Press to seal; crimp with a fork. Cut a few vents in tops; brush with egg.
Bake until pies are golden brown, 30–35 minutes. Let cool slightly.
DO AHEAD: Filling can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

spiced-seed-sprinkle.name: Spiced Seed Sprinkle
instructions: Preheat oven to 300°. Lightly coat a rimmed baking sheet with nonstick spray. Lightly beat egg white in a small bowl until frothy. Add pumpkin seeds, sesame seeds, sugar, salt, cayenne, and cardamom and stir to coat.
Spread out seed mixture on prepared baking sheet and bake, stirring every 5 minutes or so, until pumpkin seeds are toasted and mixture is dry, 18–22 minutes. Let cool.
Do Ahead: Sprinkle can be made 1 week ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

spicy-guacamole.name: Spicy Guacamole
instructions: Add avocados and lemon juice to a medium mixing bowl; mash until desired consistency is almost reached. Stir in tomatoes, scallions, jalapeno peppers, garlic, cilantro, salt, red pepper flakes, pepper, and cayenne. Taste guacamole and adjust for seasoning.

spicy-jalapeno-bacon-mac-and-cheese.name: Spicy Jalapeno Bacon Mac And Cheese

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook elbow macaroni in boiling water, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes. Drain.

Place bacon in a large skillet and cook over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until nearly crispy, about 5 minutes. Add jalapeños and fry until they are soft and bacon is crispy, about 5 minutes. Drain some of the bacon fat, leaving 4 tablespoons of fat in the pan.

Stir chile paste into the pan and fry for 1 minute. Add salt and pepper to taste. Add flour and cook for 1 minute. Cook and stir garlic in the pan for 1 minute. Pour in milk and cook over medium heat, constantly whisking, for 5 minutes. Remove from heat and let sit for 10 minutes to slightly cool and prevent cheese from separating.
Stir Cheddar cheese and Parmesan cheese into mixture until melted. Add drained pasta and mix together. Serve.

spicy-lamb-pizza-with-parsleyred-onion-s.name: Spicy Lamb Pizza With Parsley–red Onion Salad
instructions: Place a baking sheet on a rack in lower third of oven; preheat to 500°. Mix garlic, tomato paste, cinnamon, cumin, paprika, and ¾ tsp. salt in a large bowl. Mix in lamb.

Working with 1 piece of dough and keeping remaining piece covered, gently stretch dough into a 10x8" oval and transfer to a lightly floured parchment-lined baking sheet. (If dough springs back, cover and let rest 10 minutes, then stretch again, resting as needed.) Crumble half of the lamb mixture over dough and brush edges with 1 Tbsp. oil. Slide onto preheated baking sheet and bake until crust is golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Transfer pizza to a wire rack. Repeat with remaining dough, lamb mixture, and 1 Tbsp. oil. Drizzle pizzas with more oil.
Toss onion, parsley, and lemon juice in a bowl; season with salt. Scatter over pizzas; sprinkle with red pepper flakes.

spicy-mango-relish.name: Spicy Mango Relish
instructions: Peel mango using a vegetable peeler. Continue to use the peeler on the flesh of the mango down to the pit, creating thin slices of mango. Stack the mango strips and slice into thin strips; cut crosswise to make very finely diced mango. Transfer mango to a small bowl.
Stir cilantro, Asian chile pepper sauce, rice vinegar, and salt into mango.

spicy-pasta-with-broccoli-anchovy-and-ga.name: Spicy Pasta With Broccoli, Anchovy, And Garlic
instructions: Set an oven rack about 8 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler. Toss broccoli in a bowl with 1 tablespoon olive oil and salt; spread on a large baking sheet.
Broil in the preheated oven until broccoli is tender and beginning to brown, 5 to 10 minutes.
Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook linguine at a boil until tender yet firm to the bite, about 11 minutes.

Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large skillet over low heat. Add anchovies, garlic, and red pepper flakes; cook and stir until anchovies dissolve into the oil, 3 to 5 minutes. Season with pepper. Mix in roasted broccoli.
Drain pasta and return to the pot. Add broccoli-anchovy mixture and mix well. Drizzle remaining olive oil on top.

spicy-skillet-breakfast-scramble.name: Spicy Skillet Breakfast Scramble
instructions: {'step': '1', 'instruction': 'Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add hash browns and cook, turning occasionally, until browned and heated through, about 15 minutes. Use a spatula to break up potatoes into smaller pieces. Remove from the skillet and set aside. Wipe out the skillet.'}

{'step': '2', 'instruction': 'Place bacon in the skillet and cook over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain bacon slices on paper towels and crumble when cool enough to handle. Clean out the grease from the skillet.'}

{'step': '3', 'instruction': 'Saute bell pepper in the skillet over medium-high heat until it starts to char, 5 to 7 minutes. Add jalapeno and cook for 3 to 4 minutes. Add hash browns and cook until heated through, about 3 minutes. Reduce heat to medium, and add eggs and bacon; stir until eggs are cooked, about 3 minutes.'}
{'step': '4', 'instruction': 'Add Cheddar, sour cream, and hot sauce'}

spinach-and-three-cheese-gozleme.name: Spinach And Three Cheese Gozleme

ingredients.item: ⁄4 cup chopped fresh flat leaf parsley leaves

instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour and salt. Make a well in the center and pour in the water and olive oil. Using your fingers, draw the flour in from all sides, working the mixture until it’s sticky and forms into a ball. Turn the dough onto a floured surface and knead until smooth and elastic, about 3 minutes. Transfer back to the bowl, drizzle with a little bit of oil, and turn to coat. Cover with plastic wrap and let rest at room temperature for at least 4 hours, or up to overnight.
Divide the dough in half, then divide each half into three equal pieces; you should have six equal pieces, each weighing about 2 ounces.

Roll out each yufka ball into a very thin 8- to 9-inch round, using plenty of flour to keep the dough from sticking to the rolling pin. Stack them on top of each other with a piece of parchment paper between them and plenty of flour or lay them out slightly overlapping on a baking sheet.

Heat an 11- to 12-inch cast-iron skillet or nonstick pan over medium heat and cook the yufka on one side until it starts to bubble up and lightly brown on the bottom, about 2 minutes. You only need to partially cook each flatbread at this stage; don’t get them too crispy or they will be dry and hard to work with. Stack them on top of each other as you cook each one so that they lightly steam and keep each other soft and pliable.

If you are not using immediately, transfer the warm yufka to a large zip-top plastic bag and store at room temperature up to overnight. You can also freeze the yufka for up to 2 weeks. After thawing, reheat briefly in a skillet over medium heat before using.

Heat the olive oil and onion in a sauté pan over medium-low heat and sweat the onion until softened, about 8 minutes. Using a spatula, scrape into a large mixing bowl and add the ricotta cheese, feta cheese, kasseri cheese, salt, parsley, mint, dill, and pepper to taste.

When you are ready to assemble, put about 1⁄3 cup cheese filling on each yufka and smooth it to the edges in a very thin layer. Sprinkle evenly with 3⁄4 cup spinach and season lightly with salt. Fold the left side in towards the middle and then the right side towards the middle, overlapping by about 1⁄2 inch, to form a rectangle shape with an open top and bottom.

When the gozleme are assembled, heat an 11- to 12-inch cast-iron or nonstick pan over medium-low heat. Place two gozleme at a time, seam side down, in the pan. Cook until the filling is hot, the spinach is wilted, and the bread is lightly toasted on one side but still soft on the other, 3 to 4 minutes. Flip to the other side and cook 1 minute more to heat through. Place on a tray and cover with aluminum foil to keep warm while you cook the remaining four gozleme. Cut into halves or strips and serve immediately.

spinach-honeydew-cooler.name: Spinach-honeydew Cooler
instructions: Pass spinach, melon, and lemon through a juicer.
Serve over ice.

spooky-halloween-donuts-pequerecetas.name: Spooky Halloween Donuts

ingredients.item: 2 sobres de levadura de panadero (la seca, deshidratada)
200 g de chocolate blanco de cobertura (para los colores naranja y morado)
100 g de chocolate negro o con leche de cobertura (para los oscuros)
Colorante alimentario  en gel de color naranja y morado (mejor si es liposoluble)

instructions: The first step is to heat up a little about 250 ml of milk with the skin of the orange to inmerge it. We want her warm and hot, because if she's too strong, the leaven's broken and the doughnuts aren't up.
Once temperate, remove the orange skin and dissolve into the two baker's yeast sachets. Just leave a few minutes to get them activated and make some foam.
Meanwhile, in a big bowl, mix up 400 g of force flour, 50 g sugar and half a teaspoon salt.
Then add the egg, the 50 g butter (that should be at room and soft) and finally the milk and yeast mixture.
Now you have to amass. If you do it by hand, it'll take about ten minutes and you need a soft and elastic dough. At first it's very sticky but with patience you'll see how it's leaking.

When the mass is ready, form a ball, cover with film paper or a cloth and let it stand. He needs to double his volume, so get him a hot place. I'll leave them inside the oven out. That process, first levate, takes about two hours, depending on the room temperature of your kitchen.
Once you have come up, get out the dough and amass briefly to get his air out, what's called tidal.
Then, scattering with a roller till it has an approximate thickness of a finger that isn't very thin or very thick.
It uses round cuttings, a big one for the outside and a small one for the hole, to shape the doughnuts. Put them on a plate with baking paper.
Now play second levado. You cover up the doughnuts and let them up again in a hot place. That time's shorter, about forty-five minutes should be enough.
Finally, it heats abundant soft oil to fry in a frying pan at an average temperature. If the oil's too strong, they'll get burned out.

Fry the doughnuts for tands. You leave them a few minutes from each end, till they're golden and fluffy. When you get them out, put them on a plate with cooking paper to absorb the excess fat. And ready! Now you have the perfect mass base for all the Halloween donut ideas we're about to start decorating.

To get started, you have to melt the 200 g of white chocolate cover. That's what you can do to the bathroom, or if you're just like me and you're in a hurry, in the microwave. If you use the microwave, put it at 30 second intervals at medium power, stirring every time so that it doesn't get burned. A more useful and easier to use option are the Candy Melts, some colorful chocolate clawks that also melt well and aren't easily burned as regular white chocolate. Can you buy an orange here?

Once you have it ready, put the melted chocolate into a bowl, add only a little dyes (if it's lipysoluble the color will be more homogenous and beautiful) and remove well to get the Halloween tone you're looking for.

Baits the doughnuts at the orange frying and let them dry up onto a grid. When you have the dry orange frying, wear a small pastry sleeve with molten chocolate or a padded pencil (I prefer the pencil, that's cleaner and faster) to first draw some lines that leave from the hole to the border, and then the curved lines that come with the vertical. Let him dry up and you have a Halloween doughnut that looks from a scary movie.

To make the Halloween chocolate doughnuts, melt the 100 g black chocolate in the same way into a second bowl. Take the doughnuts and just dive them and get them out with a quick move so that the cover spreads well. Let them run a little and put them onto a grid so that the excess chocolate will fall.

You can stick your sugar eyes by placing them before the chocolate melts, so as to tighten them they will stick. If chocolate's already solid or you've bought chocolate doughnuts already made, I suggest you use some melted chocolate to stick your sugar eyes and if you don't, some very thick chewing sugar. You put a little stick of glue that you choose right where you want your eye and stick your sugar eye onto. For these doughnuts have been used sugar eyes of different sizes and will be as monstrously amusing as these.

steamed-japanese-rice.name: Steamed Japanese Rice

ingredients.item: Japanese short-grain white or haiga rice

instructions: Place rice in a large saucepan, add water to cover, and swirl rice with your hand (water will become cloudy).
Drain through a fine-mesh sieve and return rice to saucepan.
Repeat process until water is clear when mixed with rice (3 or 4 times).
Drain rice a final time and cover sieve with a kitchen towel; let rest 15 minutes (this will help the grains hydrate evenly).
Return rice to same saucepan and add 2 cups water.
Partially cover pot and bring to a boil.
Stir once, cover, and reduce heat.
Simmer until water is mostly absorbed and rice is very fragrant and tender, 10–12 minutes.
Remove from heat and let rest, covered, 10 minutes.
Fluff rice with a large spoon, re-cover pot, and let sit 5 minutes before serving.

stir-fried-pea-shoots.name: Stir-fried Pea Shoots

ingredients.prep: thick stems removed, torn into 2” pieces

instructions: Heat oil in a large wok or skillet over medium-high heat. Add chiles and garlic and cook, tossing, until chiles are darkened in color and garlic is barely golden, about 30 seconds. Add pea shoots and cook, tossing often, until stems are crisp-tender and leaves are just wilted, about 1 minute; season with salt.

strawberry-and-mascarpone-tartlets-peque.name: Strawberry And Mascarpone Tartlets

ingredients.item: Opcional: hojas de menta, pistachos troceados, gelatina para tartas

instructions: We mix flour and sugar and a pint of salt into a big bowl. Then we add cold butter cut into small pieces. We work the ingredients quickly with our hands till thick crumbs form. Then we put in egg and water. We amassed everything briefly until we obtained a homogenous mass, without excessive work. We form a ball with the dough, wrapped with clear film paper and let them stand in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes so that it will be tighten and better worked after. That step is vital for the mass to gain good texture while baking.

We purify the oven at 180-3-with heat up and down. Meanwhile, we remove the mass from the refrigerator and extend with a roller onto a slightly pitted surface until it has an even thickness. With the help of a large glass or a round cutter, we cut about 12 cm in diameter. Circles have to be a little bigger than individual mold to cover completely the mold's edge. We place each mass circle into a previously greased mold, gently pressing to cover the edges as well. We paint the base of the dough several times with a fork to prevent them from going up during baking. We bake for about 15 minutes, or until the edges are slightly golden. We get the mold out of the oven and let them cool completely before we complete them.

We put up the cream till it's clear and we'll have to put them back together. In another bowl, we mix the mascarpona with the sugar glas, the vanilla and the lemon fringes till we get a soft and crisp cream. Once the mixture has been integrated, we carefully integrate the cream with wrapped movements so that the cream will be airy and light. We put the cream in the refrigerator till we use it so that it gets good consistency and keeps it fresh.

We filled baked bases with masquerading cream, helping ourselves with a spoon or pastry sleeve so that the pilling will be well distributed. We have been trying to avoid too much pressure to maintain the airy texture of the cream. Once filled up, you can put them in the refrigerator till they serve, so that they stay fresh and firm.

We wash the strawberries well, remove the stem and cut them in half or in sheets, depending on their size. We put the strawberries carefully onto the masquerading cream, trying to make them well distributed. If you wish, you can decorate the tights with some fresh mint leaves, chopped pistachios or some cake jelly that will bring shine and help set the fruit.

strawberry-practical-ice-cream-lezzet.name: Strawberry Practical Ice Cream

ingredients.item: 6 tablespoons of large drawn antep nuts

instructions: 1. Crepe pull it in the bowl of scaling.
2. Add to the vanilla and hang on the mixer until it is light.
3. Cwith Jam Mix Lemon Juice in a bowl.
4. Reç thoroughly mix the mixture with spatulas by adding to the cream and transfer push to the interior of a metal container.
5.  Derin dondurucuda en az 8 saat bekletin.
7. Wait on the deep refrigerator until the frost.
8. From the freezer & the ice cream container, wait for 5 minutes.
9. Share k&uuml with ice cream spoon and serve without waiting.

strawberry-shortcake-trifle.name: Strawberry Shortcake Trifle

ingredients.item: Containers fat-free whipped topping (such as cool whip®)
Prepared pound cake (such as sara lee®)

instructions: Combine water, sugar, and cornstarch in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat; cook, stirring constantly, until mixture is boiling and thickened, 5 to 10 minutes. Off heat, stir in gelatin mix until dissolved. Set strawberry glaze aside to cool.

Layer ½ strawberries in a trifle or glass bowl; drizzle with ½ strawberry glaze until evenly coated. Spread ½ whipped topping on top; cover with pound cake. Layer remaining ½ each strawberries, strawberry glaze, and whipped topping over pound cake.

stuffed-white-cabbage-recipe-lezzet.name: Stuffed White Cabbage Recipe
instructions: 1. Kö of cabbage; carefully frremove.
2. Take the leaves and rub the big in a saucepan 2–3 minutes in boiling salty water.
3. Softened Leaves suede in stock, keep in cold.
4. Make thintin with thick veins knife, yellow.
5. Eat onions fine, roast to pink in olive oil.
6. Add salçs, smell st up until you're tired.
7. Add chopped rice and roast up to 4–5 minutes.
8. Salt, spices, add sugar and water and cook until the water & the water.
9. Take it from January and add fine chopped parsley, mix and cool.
10. Each cabbage leaf d&uuml cool on a floor.
11. 11. 11. 11. Drink until 1 min; tuition.
12. Wrap edges into nesting roll shape.
12. August Place a few on the bottom of the pot; place the cabbage leaf (for) and tight index to wraps.
14 July Kthreeücquake salça, olive oil and hot water in a container.
15. Visit this sosu wraps
16. Close a plate to the regulator.
17. September Cook and serve up to 45–50 minutes on the ground fire.

succotash-recipe-an-american-dish-comede.name: Succotash Recipe, An American Dish
succotash-recipe-an-american-dish-comede.original_name: Receta de Succotash, un platillo americano
instructions: Pon las habas en una olla con una taza y media de agua, agrega sal al gusto y y cocina por 20 minutos hasta hervir y queden al dente.
Once they are with an idea texture, they run and leave to stand. Reserve.
Toma el cebollino y filetea muy bien. El pimiento, corta a la mitad, retira las semillas y trocea en cuadritos o tiras.
Warm up a frying pan and melt the butter. He then incorporates the onions and peppers, pits for 2 minutes and later adds the beans. Mix and cook for another minute. Turn and put them out.
In a bowl, it incorporates maize grains, cherry tomatoes and a mix of beans with onions and peppers. Fits with some salt and pepper. Add lemon juice to your taste.
Stretch and incorpate parsley, mix very well, rectify with taste and ready.
Serves and likes as a garrison or alone. Enjoy!

sunset-strip.name: Sunset Strip

ingredients.item: Dried lime wheel or lime twist

instructions: Vigorously shake simple syrup, lime juice, yuzu juice, and Ron Zacapa in an ice-filled cocktail shaker until outside of shaker is very cold, 20 seconds. Place a globe ice cube in a martini glass; strain cocktail through a Hawthorne strainer or a large slotted spoon into glass. Garnish with lime wheel.

superfood-stevia-smoothie.name: Superfood Stevia Smoothie
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'In a blender, combine mango, kale, almond milk, orange juice, stevia, and chia seeds.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Blend until smooth.'}

surprise-cookie-lezzet.name: Surprise Cookie
instructions: 1. Cook until it comes to butter and sugar cream consistency.
2. Add eggs and milk in line.
3. Finally add and mix flour, cocoa, vanilla and baking powder until it gets.
4. knead until you get a dough that does not stick.
5. Oiled paper to tray cool.
6. Cook and roll walnuts.
7. Intermittently index to tray.
8. Pre-heated 170 degree bake for 10 minutes.
9. Simply press the cookies from the oven with your finger when hot.
10. Place aer marshmallow to their mid.
11. 11. Give the tray to the oven again.
12. Wait for the oven for 1 minute.
12. August 1-2 tablespoons of melted chocolate on the top of the pancakes and cover it above.
14 July Antep peanut serpin.
15. Wait and serve in the refrigerator until Donincaya.

sweet-and-sour-tomato-jam-argiro.name: Sweet And Sour Tomato Jam

ingredients.item: 1 cup of sugar (ideally half white half black)
1 small piece of fresh ginger grated (nut size)
Cracker or thin slices of toasted bread
Goat cheese or other cream cheese
1 cup of sugar (ideally half white half black)
1 small piece of fresh ginger grated (nut size)
Cracker or thin slices of toasted bread
Goat cheese or other cream cheese

instructions: Prefer long-steal tomatoes (pomontaries), fresh or commercial.
Starting to make the tomato jam, wash and remove the tomato heart.
Squeeze out the seeds and cut into big bites.
Place them in a pot with a thick base and add the sugar, salt and spices to powder.
Allow to boil, stirring with a wooden spoon and boil for 5 minutes.
Lower the heat to medium to low and simmer for about 1 hour.
Then we tie the clove, cinnamon, spices and add them to the tomato jam.
Add the balsamic cream and mix.
Continue and simmer the jam for about half an hour.

Our marmalade is ready when we open a path-or-throw with the wooden spoon at the base of the pot. I mean, if the route we're working on doesn't refill with liquids and our jam is thick, then it's ready.
Remove the tulpan with the spices from the tomato jam.
Equalize tomato jam into two sterile jars of 250 grams.
Fill the jars with jam to the rim.
Cover with the lids, flip the jars onto the kitchen counter.
Let them cool completely.
The jam is kept for three weeks in the refrigerator after it cools down.
Enjoy the tomato jam in canapés, bruskets, along with cheese flats, grilled meat and grilled chicken, or just fill sandwiches.

sweet-cherry-of-the-spoon-argiro.name: Sweet Cherry Of The Spoon
instructions: To make cherry sweets of the spoon, we choose cherries tightly and crispy, without blows. We use gloves in cleaning because they paint the skin.
Dissolve the lime in 2 liters of water until the water is well white.
Place the cherries or rock cherries in and leave them for 2 hours. This process will help make the cherries crisp.
If you do not find lime, put the cherries in bowls with water and 2-3 lemons cut and twisted (and lemon cups).
After the two hours, rinse the fruit thoroughly with plenty of water.
Remove the stem and pits over a pot to collect their juices.
It's better if we take out the pits with the back of the hairpin so they don't melt.
Rinse the pits with 1/2 cup of water and store the water to use in the sweet.
In a pot with a thick base, place alternate cherries and sugar in layers.
Leave one night in the refrigerator to lower the cherries.
The next day, add 1/2 cup of tea water to the cherries and sugar and place the pot on high heat, so that the sweet is boiled without mixing.
As soon as it boils, remove the foams from the surface with a drilled spoon.
Lower the heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
Allow the sweet to cool completely, covered with a towel rather than with a lid.
The next day we boil the cake again for 10 minutes-15 minutes to bind.
Towards the end of the boil add lemon juice and vanilla.
After removing the sweet from the fire, move the pot round the handles.
That way the cherries will swell and suck the syrup in.
Allow the sweet to cool and place in sterile jars.

sweet-coleslaw.name: Sweet Coleslaw
instructions: Combine mayonnaise, sour cream, sugar, white balsamic vinegar, orange juice, and black pepper in a bowl.
Combine cabbage and carrots in a large bowl. Drizzle dressing over top; toss to coat.

sweet-potato-cornbread.name: Sweet Potato Cornbread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C.

Use a fork to poke holes in the sweet potatoes, drizzle with a tablespoon of olive oil and place on a baking tray and roast them for 30 minutes, until soft. Remove from the oven, let it cool, then peel and mash. You should have 1 cup of mashed sweet potato.
In a medium bowl, whisk the cornmeal, flour, brown sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, ginger, and nutmeg together. Set aside.
In a large bowl, whisk the buttermilk, eggs, sour cream, and the mashed sweet potato together until fully combined.
Mix the wet and dry ingredients together until combined. Then pour in the melted butter and mix to combine.
Place a 10-inch cast iron skillet in the oven for 5 minutes to heat up. Carefully remove it from the oven, and pour in the batter.
Bake the cornbread for 25- 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cornbread comes out clean.
Combine all ingredients for honey butter in a bowl and mix well. Set aside until ready to use.
Slice the cornbread and serve immediately spread with the cinnamon honey butter.
Enjoy!

syros-puff-pastry-argiro.name: Syros Puff Pastry

ingredients.item: 1 cup of almonds whited and grated
Butter melted and mixed with some sunflower oil
1 cup of almonds whited and grated
Butter melted and mixed with some sunflower oil

instructions: Add the water and sugar to a pot, stirring to melt the sugar.
After boiling, wait 8 minutes and add the lemon juice and the flowerwater.
Boil for 2 minutes and then bring it down from the heat and let it cool.
Preheat oven to 180 degrees C.
In bowls, mix the flour, ground almond, semolina, mastic and baking powder.
Beat the sugar in the mixer for five minutes until the mixture is white and puffed.
Add the butter to combine well.
Lower the mixer speed and add the flour with the almonds a little, a little and alternately with the milk and the flowerwater. After they've joined together, we stop the mixer.
Butter the oven pan and spread the 6 leaves by buttering them one by one, to stand out of the baking pan around.
Add the mixture in and straighten with tan.
Cover the filling with the spare leaves, buttering them in between, folded in half.
With a sharp knife cut the leaf into pieces, bake to blush.

We remove them from the oven and leave them for five minutes, then syrup them with the cold syrup, adding a little, a little spoon in three give, as soon as it draws the first, we continue the second, likewise and third.
After absorbing the syrup and cool cut into pieces and serve.
We thank Danai Miliou for sharing with us this traditional sweet recipe from Syros.
